Notes: ESP32 SDA direct to DDR5 HSDA in the proven basic adapter harness; optional level shifting/pull-ups may help other harnesses
ESP32 SCL direct to DDR5 HSCL in the proven basic adapter harness; optional level shifting/pull-ups may help other harnesses
Controls optional MOSFET high-side VIN_BULK switch; HIGH = DIMM off; LOW = DIMM on; DIMM VIN_BULK can also be fed directly from stable 5 V or a manual switch
PWR_EN pull-up required; GPIO33 control optional. Pull PWR_EN up to 3.3 V through 10 kΩ for the proven basic adapter harness; GPIO33 may optionally pull LOW to disable regulators
PWR_GOOD pull-up required/recommended and monitored by GPIO34. Pull up to 3.3 V through 10 kΩ; readiness/wiring indicator only; do not trust bus results while LOW
Used during ESP32-controlled HSA testing only; preferred bench method is manual HSA strap plus full VIN_BULK cold reset
